title: Zangla Khar
tagline: Zangla Khar — heritage city of Ladakh (UT)

overview.short: Current day Zangla village has no monastery, only a nunnery.
overview.description: Current day Zangla village has no monastery, only a nunnery. Zangla Palace is sometimes called Zangla Monastery due to a mistake probably first made by Tivadar Duka, biographer of Alexander Csoma de Kőrös, and later by Ervin Baktay, an Indologist who visited Zangla in 1928 to identify the locations related to Alexander Csoma de Kőrös. Suffering from malaria, he described Zangla Palace – probably due to the shrine and the monks living there – as a monastery. topPlaces.name: Zangla
topPlaces.description: Zangla is a village in Zanskar tehsil of Zanskar district, in the Indian union territory of Ladakh. It is located 262 km (163 mi) southeast of Kargil city, the district headquarters, and 32 km (20 mi) northeast of Padum, the headquarters of Zanskar.

items.note: Zangla is a village in Zanskar tehsil of Zanskar district, in the Indian union territory of Ladakh. It is located 262 km (163 mi) southeast of Kargil city, the district headquarters, and 32 km (20 mi) northeast of Padum, the headquarters of Zanskar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Zangla Khar?
faq.a: The best time to visit Zangla Khar is Apr – Jun, Sep – Oct. Summers are 10–22°C and winters are -6–10°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Zangla Khar?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kushok Bakula Rimpochee Airport, Leh (74 km) and the nearest railway station is Katra (Vaishno Devi railhead) (203 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Zangla Khar?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Zangla Khar at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Zangla Khar?
faq.a: Stays in Zangla Khar start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
